questions.question: National Tribal Dance Festival is to be held in which city?
questions.explanation: A three-day National Tribal Dance Festival will be held in Raipur, Chhattisgarh. The festival is to be held on 27-29 December 2019. The National Tribal Dance event will be organized at the Science College Ground from 10 am to 8:30 pm. During the event, artists from various states and countries will march past in their traditional attires. Nearly 1,400 artists of 151 art troupes from 23 states and guest artists from 6 countries will participate.

questions.question: Baburmahal Gram Panchayat of which state has got best performance award in Rural Job Scheme awards?
questions.explanation: West Bengal has got the first prize in 100-day work programme for promoting livelihoods. State’s Bankura and Cooch Behar stood first and second respectively among districts in the country in implementation of the rural job scheme. Baburmahal GP (gram panchayat) of Kulpi, South 24 Paraganas also got the best performance award.

questions.question: Which joint military exercise was recently concluded by Nepal and India?
questions.explanation: Surya Kiran is an annual bilateral military exercise between India and Nepal. It is conducted in alternative basis. This year it was held in Salijhandi of Rupendehi district of Nepal. Its aim is to conduct battalion-level combined training to increase interoperability in jungle warfare and counter-terrorist operations in mountainous terrain, humanitarian assistance, disaster relief, medical and environmental conservation.

questions.question: The Centre is planning to initiate ‘Saksham Anganwadi’ scheme through which of its ministries?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of health and family welfare

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of women and child development

answer.label: C
answer.text: Ministry of women and child development

questions.explanation: The ministry of women and child development is planning to implement the ‘Saksham Anganwadi’ scheme. Through this program, 2.5 lakh anganwadis are to be upgraded over the next 5 years. The scheme will introduce upgraded facilities like smart teaching, smart learning, crèche facilities, etc.

questions.question: Which north-eastern state got its first ever Special Economic Zone (SEZ) in Sabroom in December?
questions.explanation: Tripura got its first ever Special Economic Zone in December. The SEZ was intended for agro- based food processing and was set up in South Tripura district’s Sabroom region. The investment in this project is to be around 1,550 crore INR.

questions.question: The Jigyasa program is an initiative of which institution?

options.label: D
options.text: Council for Scientific and Industrial Research

answer.label: D
answer.text: Council for Scientific and Industrial Research

questions.explanation: The Jigyasa program is an initiative of CSIR (Council for Scientific and Industrial Research). It is a national program constituted as a part of its Scientific Social Responsibility. Recently, the council’s drug research institute conducted Q&A session for school students under this program.

questions.question: What is HAT-P-36b, which was recently renamed as ‘Bran’ by IAU?
questions.explanation: The HAT-P-36b is an exoplanet which in the stellar system of HAT-P-36, which was renamed as Tuiren by the International Astronomical Union. The exoplanet is in the constellation Canes Venatici (the Hunting Dog constellation). The name is based on Irish mythology and was suggested by Ireland.

questions.question: What is ToTok which has been in news recently?
questions.explanation: ToTok is a messaging app. It is being warned against for its potential illegal surveillance activity. The app was developed by UAE-based Breej Holdings Ltd. It was recently removed from several app stores like Google Play. It is noted for having fewer restrictions unlike WhatsApp and Skype.

questions.question: The Ethiopian Prime Minister, the 2019 Nobel Peace Prize winner, had recently called for peace in Horn of Africa. What is it?
questions.explanation: Horn of Africa is a peninsula in Africa that extends hundreds of kilometers into the Arabian Sea. It lies along the southern side of the Gulf of Aden. The countries that exist in this region are Djibouti, Eritrea, Ethiopia and Somalia.

questions.question: Which app was recently released by the president to improve access to blood banks?
questions.explanation: The President had recently released the mobile app of the Red Cross Society of India in Hyderabad. It was developed by the Telangana Centre for Good Governance. It is accessible in all languages. The app will ensure easier access to blood bank and Red Cross membership.
